creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 154610
complete net-mgmt/network-manager port, in shar format

Several requests were made for a FreeBSD version
of the GhostBSD metworkmgr
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/finally-a-network-manager-for-freebsd.50638/
so I obliged -- Here it is.

Please find network-manager.shar, and a QA session LOG files, also
attached to this PR.

Thanks!

--Chris
